nasb.text: Gather the people, sanctify the congregation, Assemble the elders, Gather the children and the nursing infants. Let the bridegroom come out of his room And the bride out of her bridal chamber.

esv.text: gather the people. Consecrate the congregation; assemble the elders; gather the children, even nursing infants. Let the bridegroom leave his room, and the bride her chamber.

cnv.text: 你們要召集民眾， 使會眾分別為聖； 招聚老人， 聚集孩童， 和在懷中吃奶的嬰孩； 讓新郎從新房出來， 新婦從內室出來。

ccb.text: 要招聚老人，聚集孩童， 包括吃奶的婴儿； 要吩咐新郎出洞房、 新娘出内室； 要召集全体人民， 让他们洁净自己。
